mapper.insert:
insert into sys_user (id,username,password, name, age, email,phone,status) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.username}, #{item.password}, #{item.name}, #{item.age}, #{item.email}, #{item.phone}, #{item.status})

insert into sys_user (id,username,password, name, age, email,phone,status) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.username}, #{item.password}, #{item.name}, #{item.age}, #{item.email}, #{item.phone}, #{item.status})
on duplicate key update username = values(username), password = values(password), name = values(name), age = values(age), email = values(email), phone = values(phone), status = values(status)
